'''Scay Danson''' was a member of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]. A few months following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Danson filed a report regarding the possible threat of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]].<ref name="UG">{{InsiderCite|89|Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villainy}}</ref>

Danson went on to become one of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] biggest industrial saboteurs. Working for the highest bidder, Scay preferred to target megacorporations such as [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] and [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]].<ref name="CCW" />
